did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a comprehensive survey of image-based computer-aided diagnosis systems for skin cancer. It explicitly reviews and compares AI and machine learning techniques such as Support Vector Machines (SVM), K-Nearest Neighbors (K-NN), Artificial Neural Networks (ANN), Naïve Bayes, and Multilayer Perceptrons used for tasks including segmentation, feature extraction, and classification of melanoma and other skin lesions in dermoscopy images.

is_this_paper_a_review_paper_or_a_resear.details: The title explicitly states 'A comprehensive survey on image-based computer aided diagnosis systems for skin cancer'. The abstract confirms this by stating 'In this paper we review state of the art in computer aided diagnosis system and examine recent practices...'. The paper summarizes and compares existing literature, datasets, and techniques rather than presenting original experimental results from a new study.

non_compliance_reason: The paper is a review, survey, or meta-analysis rather than an original research paper.
